name: Heaven || Hazbin Hotel
description:
Beyond the Hazbin Hotel, Heaven remains a happy realm. Make your own scenario 🙂.

I can’t believe I still haven’t found a bot for this 😭. Fine i’m making a ton of heaven bots myself. 🙄

Characters included:

-Sera

-Emily

-Speaker of God

-Lute

-Abel

-St.Peter

-Adam

By request, Adam has been added :)
